name: Marco Bianchi
bio: Commanding presence between the posts and a calm distributor under pressure. Marco reads the game superbly and organises his defence with authority.

name: David Silva
bio: Young backup goalkeeper with excellent reflexes and composure on the ball. David is developing fast and pushing for a starting berth.

name: Antonio Greco
bio: Tenacious right back who loves to bomb forward and whip in dangerous crosses. Rarely beaten in one-on-one situations.

name: Leon Müller
bio: A dominant centre-back who wins everything in the air and is lethal from set pieces. Leon marshals the backline with composure and experience.

name: Raffaele Esposito
bio: Solid centre-back with excellent positioning and a great passing range from the back. Raffaele is the quiet organiser of the RSA defence.

name: José Fernández
bio: Attack-minded left back who delivers quality balls into the box and works tirelessly up and down the flank.

name: Thomas Richter
bio: Experienced veteran who reads the game like a chess grandmaster. Thomas brings calm and leadership to the back line when it matters most.

name: Matteo Conti
bio: The engine of the RSA midfield — Matteo covers every blade of grass, wins the ball and then creates with intelligent passes. A fans' favourite.

name: Pierre Dubois
bio: A dynamic box-to-box midfielder with an eye for goal. Pierre brings flair and directness to the RSA midfield and loves to shoot from range.

name: Carlos Santos
bio: Energetic young midfielder who presses relentlessly and is never afraid to take on a man. Carlos is one of the brightest prospects in the squad.

name: Niklas Weber
bio: Deep-lying playmaker who dictates tempo and finds passes others cannot see. Niklas is the metronome that keeps RSA ticking.

name: Federico Romano
bio: Wide midfielder who combines technical skill with pace. Federico is always willing to run in behind and cause problems for opposing defences.

name: Luca Rossi
bio: A tireless forward who stretches every back line and finishes with either foot. Luca is the goal-getter who makes RSA TEAM tick in the final third.

name: Emre Yılmaz
bio: Powerful centre-forward who holds the ball up brilliantly and brings team-mates into play. Emre is a constant threat in the opposition box.

name: Alex Martin
bio: Pacy wide forward who loves to run at defenders and cut inside. Alex has been a revelation since breaking into the first team this season.
